content_body: This was our fifth trip renting these beautiful cabins in Blue Ridge from Cabin Rentals of Georgia. In the past we have stayed at Crooked Creek, Rivers Edge, Above The Pines, and Aska Adventure Outpost. Now, we decided to stay in Outlaw Ridge along the Toccoa River.  We loved the fall colors and beautiful view. We took a day trip to Dahlonega to go to the outlets and a tasting tour at Wolf Mountain Vineyard. We also went on a hike at the Ocoee Whitewater Center. We made sure to stop by downtown Blue Ridge at Hucks General Store and Mercier Orchards. We didn't see any wildlife but the guys caught some rainbow trout down by the water with the help of some advice from a local... It worked! We had a wonderful stay and look forward to our next cabin. Thank you for your outstanding quality of cabins.
title: Our Fifth Trip to Cabin Rentals of Georgia
